title: ShortestPathResult
description: ShortestPathResult: Results associated with the computation of shortest paths.

TimeStep.description: Time step for time history results.

Path.description: Shortest path as an ordered collection of entities.

Curves.description: Shortest path as an ordered collection of ICurves.

Length.description: Total length of the shortest path. If the graph contained spatial entities and relations the distance traversed. If the graph is non spatial a count of traversed relations.

Cost.description: Total cost of the shortest path. Sum of each relation weight multiplied by its the length.

EntitiesVisited.description: All entities visited in searching for the path.

Relations.description: Shortest path as an ordered collection of IRelations.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
